sections.paragraph:
Original: עזאזל

Transliteration: ‛ăzâ'zêl

Phonetic: az-aw-zale'

BDB Definition:

  1. entire removal, scapegoat
    1. refers to the goat used for sacrifice for the sins of the people
    2. meaning dubious

Origin: from H5795 and H235

TWOT entry: 1593

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
